description_long: This is a medium-height, rectangular shelving unit constructed primarily from light-colored wood, featuring a minimalist and modern design. The structure consists of four open shelves, each supported by slender vertical side panels, with no visible doors, drawers, or back panel reinforcements. The shelves are evenly spaced, providing ample storage or display space for books, decor, or other items. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the piece a natural and warm appearance suitable for both indoor and semi-outdoor urban environments. The open design allows for easy access from the front, while the sides and back are solid, enhancing stability. The overall build suggests it is lightweight enough to be moved by one or two people, yet sturdy enough to support moderate loads.
description: A light wood, open-shelved unit with four evenly spaced shelves and a minimalist, modern design. The structure is freestanding and suitable for storage or display in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing four open shelves and the full storage capacity of the unit.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the shelves and the solid side panel construction.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, unadorned back panel and the overall rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, highlighting the shelf depth and side panel.
